programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: In the gripping conclusion to this two-part special, the victims of historic child sex abuse come forward to try and finally get justice, and prevent the suspect from walking free for the ninth time.

programme.title: 999: What Happened Next
programme.desc: A car sale on social media turns into a knife-point carjacking and a high-speed car chase.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in...
programme.desc: Joe and Phil Wang take in Washington DCs wonders, as they tick off the worlds biggest obelisk, Barbie Pond and a secret door experience, before finishing with a signature Gin Rickey.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz head to Oxfordshire to pick up an accident damaged Porsche 911 Targa. The car belongs to former taxi driver Ben, who has been diagnosed with early onset dementia.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank take a one-of-a-kind rocket car out for a spin.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Its a tank-off as Henry Cole turns a redundant water tank into a mobile shelving unit in Oxfordshire, while Simon OBrien transforms some old tanks into a pizza oven in Liverpool.

programme.title: Chateau DIY: Win the Dream
programme.desc: The Heat 3 final offers up the most demanding test yet: hosting a refined food and wine night. Only one pair will earn a spot in the final showdown.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Lisa and Neil fulfil their dream of buying a holiday home on the Costa Cálida to share with their children. With a budget of £100k, can they find the perfect place?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Shirley and Ken see what Famagusta has to offer for £175k, from a hard no non-starter to two perfect places that have them moving in already. How will they pick between two dream homes?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hosting in Reading, fun-loving Sonya Smith knows her cooking skills arent the best and hopes to bungle her way through the night, and win the guests over, with her good humour and Touch of Sparkle theme. There are kitchen calamities galore, and Sonya quite literally wets herself laughing. Grumpy geezer Glen is unimpressed with the choice of entertainment, curvaceous corset-maker Serine teaches some decorum.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cocky Cockney Glen Wilkie serves up a menu he is convinced will be a winner. Even a disaster with his `super duper tiramisu doesnt dent his confidence. His main of Bambi on a plate causes tears at the table from Sonya Smith and a refusal from Sabi Phagura. Sensitive student Richard Howse can only sit by and watch with his new best friend Serine Daou as the night descends into chaos.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the third night in Reading and the turn of mature student Richard Howse. With a menu and set of instructions from his omnipresent girlfriend, Katy, Richard sets about making his pirate themed night the best of the week. A treasure hunt brings out Glen Wilkies true feelings about fellow guest Serine Daou, and Sonya Smith takes a disliking to some of the gluten-free fare on offer.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fitness fanatic Sabi Phagura goes back to her roots with a bhangra-themed evening that puts her healthy lifestyle on the backburner for one day as she cooks traditional Indian food for her four guests. The food doesnt quite live up to everyones expectations, and her entertainment leaves Richard and Glen in an intimate situation. Now that his night is out of the way, Glen does everything he can to wind up everyone.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final evening in Reading, corset-maker Serine Daou has the daunting task of trying to end the week with a bang. Her gourmet burgers are more burger than gourmet, but - as part of her burlesque night - her guests costumes dont disappoint. When her entertainment doesnt appeal to Glen, he swings back into action with some more wind-ups.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Basingstoke, Chris wraps up the week with a 90s music theme and a `Franglais menu. However, with simmering tensions between Mark and Izzy, he hopes that a lip sync battle can win over his guests.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit Manchester to hunt for first homes for two young buyers who are new to the market. Interior designer Abigail Carpe is keen to buy her first home. David Isaac is after a roomy city-centre pad.

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: The series that celebrates the beautiful south west returns. Cornwalls Lost Gardens of Heligan sow the seeds of a wildflower revolution and we meet Brixhams maverick skipper.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The remaining potters create floral posies and vases, before taking on a surprise embellishing challenge. Wholl bloom into the next round, and whose posy isnt all rosy?

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: In Nottingham, staff at Queens Medical Centre deal with a crime wave of needle-spiking attacks on female university students - including Kate, who collapsed at a nightclub.

programme.title: 999: What Happened Next
programme.desc: A car sale on social media turns into a knife-point carjacking and a high-speed car chase.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers gets stuck into a new series and more of the biggest and best TV. What do they think this time?

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: A new series behind the scenes at world-leading cancer hospital Royal Marsden, where aspiring midwife Anthea has a difficult tumour that could lead to arm amputation.

programme.title: Walkers Unpacked: Inside the Crisp Factory
programme.desc: Its crunch time, as one of Britains best-known brands launches its latest crisp flavour. From soil to shelf, we tear into the journey of how Walkers new crisp is born.

programme.title: Walkers Unpacked: Inside the Crisp Factory
programme.desc: Its crunch time, as one of Britains best-known brands launches its latest crisp flavour. From soil to shelf, we tear into the journey of how Walkers new crisp is born.

programme.title: Jamies Feasts for a Fiver
programme.desc: Jamie makes gnarly celeriac skewers, a hearty spiced cauliflower bake complete with an edible lid, a steaming winter chilli, crispy potato and chickpea parcels and soul-warming soup.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: On a remote Yorkshire Dales track, Alpha recovery ops face one of their toughest rescue missions - a 50-ton construction machine is stranded by a severely-damaged Victorian bridge.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary series from New Zealand following the madness and mayhem faced by intrepid officers as they pull over motorists for a variety of suspected offences.

programme.title: Entertainment News On 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The cops deal with a major drugs bust in North Yorkshire, a wanted man linked to an alleged assault on a woman, and a gang of suspected poachers who are caught driving an untaxed van.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Lisa and Lewis tackle a troublesome lad with a potty mouth, followed by a trip to the canal, where a member of the public has heard gunshots. Phil Broughton is hot on the heels of a fail-to-stop Ford pushing speeds of over a ton.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Profiling the work of high-speed police interception units around the country with some of the most dangerous pursuits and shocking footage ever captured. Exploring what it takes to bring order to chaos.

programme.title: The Left Handed Gun
programme.desc: When his mentor is gunned down in a range war, Billy the Kid winds up in jail after tracking down the killers and taking his revenge. He manages to escape and cross the border into Mexico, but an affair with a married woman and an encounter with a former friend, inevitably leads to more death and destruction.

programme.title: The Left Handed Gun

programme.title: The Lone Gun
programme.desc: Cruze arrives in town and when he stands up to the three Moran brothers, he gets appointed Marshal. First the brothers kill a rancher while framing another man, but when the jailer is murdered, Cruze gets evidence the Morans did it.

programme.title: Trucking Heavy
programme.desc: In South Wales, Craig tackles a 60-tonne piling rig used to set foundations for large buildings. In Rochdale, Matt must load and then deliver a stone crusher to a site in the Lake District.

programme.title: Winter Road Rescue
programme.desc: Snowplough drivers and patrols are prepared to work all day and all night to keep UK roadways clear from obstruction when winter sweeps the nation. Fearless in the face of a cold front, these men and women are there to assist when disaster strikes.

programme.title: Winter Road Rescue
programme.desc: Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The police interceptors tackle a difficult night shift. Ortis is with Spike as they pursue a fleeing car that drives into a dead end, while Rick is with dog handler Ian as theyre called to back up the firearms squad.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The interceptors take on youngsters who cause carnage on our roads and put themselves and others in danger. Spike and dog handler Ian pursue a 20-year-old drunk driver into a travellers site. Ben goes head-to-head with a speeding boy racer.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Americas Speeders
programme.desc: In the middle of New Jerseys car theft epidemic, Patrolmen Maurice Marsilla and Bill Gibson pull over a suspicious Lamborghini that is 1000 miles from home; they discover that the driver is a wanted man but he doesnt want to stick around.

programme.title: Police: Night Shift 999
programme.desc: Bringing you the latest and best in programming entertainment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: Cant Tell You How to Live
programme.desc: A woman asks police to get involved after her ex threatened to destroy her home; prior medical procedures drive a woman to find a dangerous way to ease her pain; deputies search for a mysterious driver who fled a car crash.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle; a womans impatience lands her in hot water when shes pulled over for tailgating; officers give a driver multiple chances to come clean to no avail.

programme.title: Banged up Abroad
programme.desc: In 1974 Steve Peterson attempts to smuggle 120 kg of marijuana from Mexico into the US. The plan is interrupted by Tijuana cops and Steve faces years behind bars in the infamous and deadly La Mesa penitentiary.

programme.title: Extreme Tow Truckers
programme.desc: Tempers flare when Parks Towing takes on the task of rescuing a high-pressure truck from the bottom of a steep ravine in the snow-capped mountains of Canterbury, New Zealand.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Todd goes on a risky run to deliver the heaviest haul in company history, Arts sent on a high stakes rescue mission, Lisa gets an exclusive contract, Darrell steals a load from Polar.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: On the busy A1, halfway between Newcastle and Durham, an articulated lorry has fallen down a 20-metre embankment. The Alpha Recovery crew must work out how to retrieve the truck with traffic thundering by.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: On the busy A1, halfway between Newcastle and Durham, an articulated lorry has fallen down a 20-metre embankment. The Alpha Recovery crew must work out how to retrieve the truck with traffic thundering by.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Super-sized transport jobs require even bigger trucks to perform them. Lifting the lid on the heavy recovery business, featuring industrial strength trucks capable of towing and lifting the biggest and heaviest machines on the nations roads.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Phillip is dizzy and disorientated, and his GP suspects an amnesiac disorder. Karen has come for anti-anxiety medication. Probing deeper into his patients life story, Dr Youseff Beaini learns that Karen was a victim of a sexual assault.

programme.title: Skin AandE
programme.desc: Following work at a specialist clinic where four top dermatologists treat a range of conditions. They squeeze, drain or pop cysts, lipomas and anything else thats getting under their patients skin.

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits in the Sun

programme.title: Shoplifters and Scammers: At War With The Law
programme.desc: Weston Favell Shopping Centre in Northampton is a popular shopping destination, attracting seven million customers per year. Kitted out with 150 cameras, the security team are on the constant look-out for anyone who stands out.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Derbyshires finest face a series of issues with motorcyclists - with one evading them for over an hour in a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The road crime team tail a wanted driver in their unmarked cars. They plan to surround the target.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The interceptors have to drop everything when a speeding 4x4 rushes past them. The Stanway team pursues a man with a machete on the run in a public park.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A look back at the highlights of the series, including the units efforts to catch a stolen 4x4 that tries to run a police Evo off the road. Elsewhere, officers have a trick up their sleeve when a speeding driver attempts to outrun nine cop cars.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A drunk driver leads the interceptors on a merry-go-round. The team joins forces with the chopper to track down a wanted criminal on a motorbike, and a young driver crashes straight into an unmarked police car.

programme.title: Rogue Claimers
programme.desc: The Police close in on a cash for crash gang, the diagnosis isnt good for a travellers bogus medical claim and a tailors claim for expensive suits ruined by sewage goes down the pan.

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Following the residents of the small beach town of Summer Bay, as they deal with relationships, family, love, loss, and growing up.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Dr Amir Khan removes the biggest lipoma he has ever seen from Nigels chest, then lances a teenagers blood-blistered fingertip. Vanda was told she had only two years to live, but Dr Chris Harris offers a more positive prognosis.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Dan was driving at around 50mph when his car left the road and hit a tree. Dr Humphreys next patient is Eric, an 86-year-old former miner who is struggling with a chest infection.

programme.title: 999 Critical Condition
programme.desc: A woman has fallen 50 metres down a waterfall. She has multiple obvious injuries that need urgent care. A man arrives in a critical condition: hes unconscious and his eyes are not reacting to the light.

programme.title: 999: Emergency Call Out
programme.desc: A driver who has crashed into another car passes a breath test but his behaviour is a cause for concern. And in Kent, a lorry crashes into a railway bridge and the driver runs off.

programme.title: Skin AandE
programme.desc: A 6-foot-7 butcher from Somerset brings in a meaty lipoma on his neck for Dr Dev, and Dr Emma and nurse Donna have very different viewpoints when it comes to whether it would be good for a leg cyst to explode whilst its being removed.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Teorin and Collettes large family home was turned into a holiday stopover for strangers. Alex is dependent on rent for her medical expenses, but her tenant has not paid in months. Council officers Ozge and Jo uncover 40 people crammed into a potential death-trap of a house.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord who trusted his property to a letting agency discovers that it is being advertised on a Romanian website. A single mums tenant has vanished owing £10k in back rent and she has to prove he has abandoned the property to get it back.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Susan and Garys too-good-to-be-true letting agent broke into their house and changed the locks. Paul learned that his fathers tenant owed a staggering £20k in rent.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: 80-year-old Aristo is having trouble in the bedroom and Silvia is struggling with excessive flatulence. Plus, regular patient Barbara is losing her memory. Later, Dr Amir Khan attempts to remove a large growth from inside a patient?s ear.

programme.title: Eggheads
programme.desc: The Eggheads team are made up of some of Britains top quizzers. They face a team of challengers trying to beat the incumbents in order to win a cash prize. If the Eggheads beat the challengers, the cash prize is rolled over to subsequent episodes.

programme.title: Behind Bars: Sex, Bribes and Murder
programme.desc: After a three-minute video featuring a female prison officer and an inmate having sex inside HMP Wandsworth goes viral, award-winning journalist Mobeen Azhar begins an investigation into what happened and why. A year of twists, turns and damning revelations pulls back the curtain on a dangerous wider world of coercion, corruption and contraband thriving behind bars.

programme.title: This Is BBC THREE

programme.title: The Catch-Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall has encountered some incredible animals on his search around the planet for his Deadly 60. All the animals that made it onto Steves list are deadly in their own right, but a handful of them are deadly to humans. This programme looks at those animals in detail, dispelling myths and showing just how incredible they truly are.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Naturalist Steve Backshall has travelled the world in search of animals for his Deadly 60 list. Many of the animals he has encountered are armed and highly dangerous. This programme looks back at some of Steves favourite creatures whose jaws, claws, venom and speed prove to be very useful weapons in the battle of the wild.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond is dropped into the remote, frozen wastes of Canada to test a watch with a built-in emergency beacon. Also in this show, Clarkson is on the track in the new 471 horsepower Lexus RC F coupe.

programme.title: The Traitors Ireland
programme.desc: Siobhán McSweeney charges into chaos, suspicion, and stylish skulduggery. A group of strangers arrive at the castle. Their mission is to win ?50,000 without getting murdered or banished in the game. The twist? The Traitors walk amongst them.

programme.title: The Traitors Ireland
programme.desc: Siobhán McSweeney charges into chaos, suspicion, and stylish skulduggery. A group of strangers arrive at the castle. Their mission is to win ?50,000 without getting murdered or banished in the game. The twist? The Traitors walk amongst them.

programme.title: The Inspection
programme.desc: Rejected by his mother, a young gay man finds unexpected strength, camaraderie and support after he joins the Marines.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: James May is taken far outside his comfort zone as he straps into an insanely fast, highly tuned, 600 horsepower hatchback and is thrown into the lions den of World Rallycross racing. Nicholas Hoult tries his hand in the Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: Behind Bars: Sex, Bribes and Murder
programme.desc: As Mobeens investigation deepens, it becomes clearer that illicit relationships between prisoners and jail staff are just the tip of the iceberg. The bigger story involves organised criminal gangs determined to cash in on a lucrative prison drug economy. When news breaks of a prison governor being jailed for a relationship with a drug-dealing gang boss, Mobeen becomes determined to uncover the true extent of criminal influence inside our prisons.

programme.title: Behind Bars: Sex, Bribes and Murder

programme.title: Marcus Wareing Simply Provence
programme.desc: The baguette is an essential in France thats eaten with every meal. Baguette in hand, Marcus hits the market looking for inspiration, and its not long before hes found a stall selling dozens of rotisserie chickens.

programme.title: Clive Myries African Adventure
programme.desc: Clive lends a hand at a penguin rehab centre, jams with up-and-coming jazz talent Q Ntshinka and learns the art of Cape Malay cooking in the citys colourful Bo-Kaap district.

programme.title: Clive Myries African Adventure

programme.title: Dr Xands Con or Cure
programme.desc: Dr Xand investigates a common prescription drug with horrific withdrawal symptoms. Also on the programme, the effects of late-night eating on sleep and weight gain. And the incredible story of a condition that makes sufferers drunk without drinking alcohol.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A couple of end terraces in Preston and Mid-Glamorgan and a semi-detached in Newcastle are sold under the hammer. Martin and Martel meet the new owners who are ready to tackle the projects with the aim of making a profit on their investments.

programme.title: Political Thinking with Nick Robinson

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Steve Brown helps a Bristol couple to move to the Wye Valley. Its not far from where they live now, but its a whole world away in terms of lifestyle.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Presenter Paul Martin and the team head to the historic Alnwick Castle in Northumberland. Experts David Fletcher and Anita Manning find some amazing local treasures amongst the crowd. Anita is charmed by some Murano glass figurines and David is thrilled to discover a Newcastle shipyard visitors book. Paul also heads inside the magnificent State Rooms of Alnwick Castle itself.

programme.title: The Damned United
programme.desc: The story of Brian Cloughs 44 day stint as manager of Leeds United Football Club. England, in 1974. When Don Revie quits Leeds to become the England boss, the outspoken Brian Clough takes charge. Determined to impose his own style upon Revies tough tackling team, Clough soon alienates his players and the board. Based on the book by David Pearce.

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: Reporter Bronagh Munro investigates why Omar Benguit has spent 23 years in prison for murder when there is no CCTV or forensic evidence linking him to the crime.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: When Lou is attacked by a bully, he bravely retalliates with a song.

programme.desc: Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes go on an underwater adventure inside a rubbery bubble made by a young and friendly Watermelonsuchus, but things take a turn when the Bananaraptors get involved.

programme.title: Bluey

programme.desc: The Game Catchers land on a black and white planet where they meet little aliens resembling geckos, whose favourite game is "hunters and prey".

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Harriet and Osbourne lay a treasure trail for the class, but Kid spoils the fun by eating all the paper clues that they have hidden around the nursery. Timmy turns detective and follows the real clues that Kid has left in an attempt to find the special treat that lies at the end of the trail.

programme.title: Our Family
programme.sub-title: Iona and Elbas Family Fun Day
programme.desc: Iona and Elba make pancakes for a fabulous family breakfast. Theres lots of egg cracking, whisking, and fruit chopping. Later, the sisters build a car for their teddy bear.

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Esmaes Norfolk Fish with Sweet Potato Wedges and Tartar Sauce
programme.desc: Esmae is inviting her friends to her special seaside themed meal, complete with everyones favourite seaside food. Esmae serves delicious fish with sweet potato wedges and tartar sauce, which contains her special ingredient - capers. Her friends are not too sure about the taste of capers when they try them before the meal, but lets hope Esmae can change their minds with the finished sauce. Esmae has even decorated her table to look like the beach!

programme.title: Teeny Tiny Creatures

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Newfoundland Sylvie is a therapy dog with big soft cuddles who loves to help people when theyre worried. She and her owner Katrina visit all sorts of people every day, young and old. Its Sylvie and Katrinas day off, and theyre planning a special lunch at the park cafe. At the bus stop, they meet Dawn from the toy shop, who is worried that her bus is running late. But seeing Sylvie waiting calmly inspires Dawn to do the same.

programme.title: Go Wild
programme.sub-title: Aneeshwar and Lizzie: Cheetah and Warthog
programme.desc: To meet some beautiful cheetahs, Aneeshwar and Lizzie lay down herbs and spices on logs in their enclosure. The two brothers love to find things with a strong odour. Aneeshwar and Lizzie see how the cheetahs use their sense of smell to achieve it.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog

programme.title: Yakka Dee

programme.title: Alphablocks

programme.title: Wonderblocks

programme.title: Colourblocks

programme.desc: Duggees not very well. Hes lost his voice. The squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the squirrels dont quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

When they fall out and go off to write their own songs separately, Yukee tries to help them become friends again and create one song together.

programme.desc: Topsy wants to tell her friends her favourite story but they interrupt her, making lots of noise. Topsy is upset. Raa Raa realises what has happened and goes to make amends.

programme.title: Graces Amazing Machines
programme.desc: Grace shows off three amazing machines that all move in a really cool way. Grace has a drive in a lowrider and makes it bounce, shows off a car that can drive over other cars in a traffic jam, and does some donuts in a drift car.

Suddenly Duggee is up and down and in and out of the tent getting everything the Squirrels need. In fact, Duggee works so hard that hes the first to fall asleep.

programme.desc: Evil Pea tricks Supertato and the Veggies, who fall into the deli counter and come face to face with the Turnip of Terror. They escape with help from the not-so-scary Turnip.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to carry Jacksons big blue chicken Ludwig (who definitely isnt a chicken) to the country fair. But the easily-startled bird gets away from them... The chase is on.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey play a game of Queens and take turns being the Queen and her Butler, but when they both want to be Butler, Mum gets crowned after Dads short stint as a chaotic Queen.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: When Nuggets favourite teddy bear gets accidentally washed by Pancake, the Piripenguins try to restore its unique smell by painstakingly recreating Nuggets happiest memories.

programme.title: Andys Safari Adventures
programme.desc: When Jen accidentally grinds up some giraffe thorn tree seeds that Mr Hammond wanted Andy to plant, Andy must head to the Namibian desert in southern Africa to track some down. And what better way to do that than from the top of a giraffe itself! But when another male giraffe arrives on the scene, a fight ensues, and Andy is caught in the middle.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Waffle discovers he has a talent for painting Mrs Hobbss cat, George, and decides to share his work with her as a way to get in her good books.

programme.title: Rafi the Wishing Wizard
programme.desc: Ruby and Finns seeds have started to grow, but Rafis cherry seed shows no change. Feeling left out, she makes a wish, and a giant cherry tree appears! Its exciting at first, but when the wish ends, everything disappears. Rafi feels sad, until Doris shares a story about planting an apple tree when she was little. Rafi realises that nature likes to take its time, and that waiting can bring something special.

programme.title: JoJo and Gran Gran
programme.sub-title: Winter: Its Time for a Special Visitor
programme.desc: Theres a family get together when Great Gran Gran comes to visit from St. Lucia. JoJo has a whole day of activities planned, but she learns that its not what you do that makes a day special, its who you spend it with.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck
programme.desc: A trip to the art gallery unexpectedly helps Duck with the hunt for his lost toy Rhino.

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: Its a very cold day on the Clangers planet. So cold, that the Iron Chicken has to come down to the living cave to get warm! But when a Sky Moo wants to do the same, she finds the doors are frozen shut and she cant get in. Granny comes to the rescue with a clever plan to keep her and the other Sky Moos warm.

programme.title: Beddybyes
programme.desc: MeMo and BaBa have fun discovering wheels and enjoying the thrill of movement.

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.sub-title: Upsy Daisy Only Wants to Sing
programme.desc: Upsy Daisy is singing with her megaphone in the garden. Here comes Upsy Daisys bed. Upsy Daisy isnt tired though and sends her bed away. Makka Pakka wants to wash Upsy daisys face but Upsy Daisy only wants to sing.

programme.title: Dil To Pagal Hai
programme.desc: Rahul is the director of a successful music and dance group and considers Nisha his best friend. Secretly, she is madly in love with him. Following an injury, new dancer Pooja joins the company and Rahul finds himself falling for her, but she is engaged to Ajay who is the son of the family who raised Pooja following her parents death. As preparations for the new show progress, will Rahul decide on a happy ending?

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Its Phoebe and Mikes big day, but all does not go to plan. Wedding planner Monica is driving the bride to distraction, New York is hit by its worst blizzard for 20 years, and Joey is taking his role standing in for Phoebes incarcerated father far too seriously. Chandler and Ross are upset that neither of them has a role, until Mike needs to replace one of his groomsmen.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler discover that their prospective adoptive childs biological father may be a `shovel killer, Ross and Rachel get dangerously close when they go to visit her sick father, and Phoebe struggles to teach Joey French for an audition.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel makes the mistake of going for a job interview at a restaurant where her current boss is also dining. Phoebe discovers she can change her name to whatever she likes - Princess Consuela Bananahammock seems the logical choice, until Mike proves that two can play her game - and Joey, upset that Chandler and Monica are moving, is comforted by an eight-year-old.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: When Rachel makes a startling announcement, Ross secretly schemes to get her former job back for her. Meanwhile, Joey is so flustered by all of the upheaval in his friends lives that Phoebe prevents him from learning about the sudden death of his agent. Monica and Chandler make a stunning discovery after they check out the house for sale next door to their new home.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Rachels Going Away Party
programme.desc: As Rachel prepares to leave for Paris, the gang throw a farewell party for her. Instead of facing them all together, she takes each of them aside for a private goodbye. One friend is offended when he is excluded. Meanwhile, Monica barks out orders as she packs precisely for her life in the suburbs with Chandler, and they watch closely the pregnant mother of their future adopted child.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The six friends prepare to say goodbye to each other.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where It All Began
programme.desc: An introduction to the gang. After Rachel leaves her Mr Potato Head look-alike fiance Barry at the altar, she moves in with Monica and discovers that independence sucks when you dont have Daddys credit cards to rely on. Meanwhile, Chandler and Joey encourage Ross to experience the advantages of bachelorhood, and Phoebe supports herself by playing guitar in the subway.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Sonogram at the End
programme.desc: Rosss lesbian ex-wife is pregnant with his child and he doesnt like her choice of last name for the baby. Elsewhere, Rachel finds out that her ex-fiance went on what would have been their honeymoon with her maid of honour.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica finds it difficult to break up with her latest boyfriend whom everyone likes, Chandler is reunited with his beloved cigarettes, and Phoebe receives a large sum of money.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: While the men attend a hockey game and end up at a hospital, the women spy on President Clintons top aide, George Stephanopoulos, who lives across the street. Meanwhile, Rachel receives her first pay packet.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An agent offers Joey a movie role as Al Pacinos naked body double, Ross tries to be less conservative, and Chandler thinks his fantasies have come true when he has an affair with a married woman.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A power cut leaves Chandler stranded in a bank with a gorgeous woman, Ross tries to ask Rachel out on a date, and Joey learns that Monica used to be infatuated with him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Nana Dies Twice
programme.desc: Monica and Ross mourn the death of their grandmother with a little help from the gang, and Monica and her mum come to an unspoken understanding about the relationship between mothers and daughters. Meanwhile, Chandler is irritated by office speculation that he is gay.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey stumbles upon a way to impress a famous actor during an audition, Ross learns the identity of a long-ago mugger, and Chandler accepts an internship at a shoe company.

programme.sub-title: The One With the Boob Job
programme.desc: Monica secretly asks Joey for a loan because she and Chandler are strapped for cash, Phoebe invites her boyfriend to move in with her, and Rachels apartment baby-proofing drives Joey crazy.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Memorial Service
programme.desc: When Chandler jokingly posts an outrageous biography about Ross on Ross college alumni website, Ross retaliates in kind, sparking an internet war. Meanwhile, Monica gets extremely vigilant after a weak-willed Phoebe asks for help to stop her from contacting Mike after their relationship ends.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Hoping to win a huge jackpot, the friends pool their money and buy dozens of lottery tickets, but they argue over how to spend the fortune if they win, and Monica irritates everyone else by buying tickets just for her and Chandler. Exasperated, Phoebe takes the bowl of everyones tickets and threatens to throw it off the balcony. The others make up, but a pigeon startles Phoebe.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A visit to the set of a soap opera inspires Rachel to dream of a romantic encounter with Joey, and Chandler must take Ross on a weekend getaway after Monica is unable to take time off from work.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Soap Opera Party
programme.desc: Ross is excited when he meets a stunning palaeontology professor, but when he takes her to Joeys rooftop party for the actors soap-opera co-stars, she intimidates him with her impressive list of former boyfriends. Meanwhile, Rachel and an intoxicated Monica make fools of themselves at the party chasing after the hunky daytime actors.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Fertility Test
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler have an embarrassing encounter with an old acquaintance at a fertility clinic, Ross plays Cyrano to help Joey woo a professor, and Rachel sneaks into a spa for a massage hoping Phoebe wont find out.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Disappointed to learn that they cannot conceive a baby naturally, Monica and Chandler consider their options. When Chandler invites a handsome colleague round for dinner, Monica and Chandler embarrassingly interview him as a potential sperm donor. Meanwhile, while shopping with Phoebe, Rachel admits that she still has a thing for Joey.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Alan Parrish disappeared as a young boy. Nobody believes his friends story that he was sucked into the game they were playing. Twenty-six years later, two children find the game in their attic, and when they start to play, Alan is released, but the game isnt over yet, and Alan must finish before he is really free.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Airing from 2005 to 2009 on NBC, the game show series returns to primetime TV with original host Howie Mandel. A contestant must choose from 26 sealed briefcases containing a marker for various amounts of cash -- from one penny to $1 million. The player then eliminates the remaining 25 cases one by one. The chosen ones are opened and the amount of money inside revealed. After several cases are opened, the player is tempted by the Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for not continuing the game and possibly winning a larger sum of money.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy and Juan
programme.desc: Freddy and Juan fly to an urgent SOS from a mine in North Carolina that a former Marine inherited from a war buddy. Without the use of their equipment, the miners operation poses a challenge to the boys.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers
programme.desc: Heavy D bets the farm on a Diesel-swapped Chevy 210, but this rusty Rat Rod could run them off the road. Meanwhile, theyre giving away a monstrous new TRX.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers
programme.desc: Work continues on the Diesel rat rod, but Heavy Ds latest military build hits a snag. Will the big rig be battle ready in time for the auction?

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: A brutal knife injury on the Northwestern leaves Sig scrambling.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: In treacherous western waters, Sig and Jake gamble on a daring new fishing strategy. Rick and Sophia attempt a perilous boat-to-boat transfer to save a quarter of a million dollars of crab. The fleet mourns the loss of beloved fisherman Nick Mavar.

programme.title: How Its Made
programme.desc: Hockey gloves, remoulded tyres and wastewater treatment: more items are put under the microscope to find out how they were made.

programme.title: How Its Made
programme.sub-title: Ambulances, Dining Room Furniture, Diatonic Accordions, Acrylic Awards
programme.desc: Ambulances, dining-room furniture and accordions: more items are put under the microscope to find out how they were made.

programme.title: How Its Made
programme.desc: Alkaline batteries, wheelchairs, flutes and cowboy boots: more items are put under the microscope to find out how they were made.

programme.title: How Its Made
programme.sub-title: Golf Balls; Parking Meters; Room Dividers
programme.desc: Golf balls, furniture handles, parking meters and room dividers: more items are put under the microscope to find out how they were made.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Soil poisoned by coal production hampers a Kentucky homestead. The Raneys must build a hillside garden on the only unpolluted land and find a source of clean water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Amputee Jeff and wife Carol need a home, water, and a place to grow food. The Raneys build an entire cabin from scratch and harness a natural spring.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant work on one of the first utility vehicles, a 1964 Ford Falcon Ranchero, whose vintage features are suffering under a coat of cheap black paint.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: What really became of Konigsberg Castles Amber Room, stolen by the Nazis? Could a lost hard drive in a British landfill hold millions in Bitcoin? Did King Solomons legendary mines ever exist?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Gold Rushs Parker Schnabel joins Josh Gates to investigate an infamous California stagecoach robbery gone bad. Fighting a driving rainstorm, Josh leans on Parkers gold mining expertise to close in on the $10M lost treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates hunts for the truth behind the worlds most iconic and fascinating legends. Leaving no stone unturned, Joshs adventures take him around the globe and into dangerous situations as he dives in to uncover the truth behind enduring mysteries.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Sig devises a way to speed up his crew. Wild Bill promotes Landon to the wheelhouse while he goes under the knife. And Keith helps Jack, but is suspicious.

programme.title: Gold Divers

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: Moonshiners Mark, Digger, Tim, and Tickle delve deep into bourbon countrys darkest secret. When 200 bottles of the coveted Pappy Van Winkle vanish, the theft of the worlds most expensive bourbon is just the tip of a staggering criminal conspiracy.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: After receiving brand-new, frightening reports, Josh Gates sends Jessica and Phil to the woods of southern New Jersey to hunt for the infamous Jersey Devil. Locals are terrified by a demonic creature thats terrorised them for more than 300 years.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: When Josh Gates receives new, potential video proof of a giant creature living in Lake Champlain, he sends Phil and Jess to investigate the 30-foot serpent thats been spotted in the lake for generations.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Phil and Jessica uncover a rash of recent sightings and new evidence in the Pacific Northwest; new leads about a frightening encounter send them into rocky, dangerous terrain along Mount St. Helens.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Responding to recent UFO sightings, Josh Gates sends his team to New Mexico for a new investigation into the infamous, unsolved Socorro Landing Incident.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Josh Gates is on the ground with Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres to chase reports of a half-man, half-beast in rural Wisconsin.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Josh Gates, Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres are hot on the trail of a werewolf-like creature terrorising locals in Wisconsin. Eyewitness accounts and sightings lead them to a remote forest where frightening clues may reveal the beasts true identity.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride Ireland
programme.desc: Brazilian Eduardo and Polish born Paulina met in Dublin five years ago and are complete opposites. Paulina is a girly girl and Eduardo is more into his adrenaline sports and drinking with the lads! In spite of their differences, its clear that Paulina and Eduardo are mad about each other.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride Ireland
programme.desc: Dubliners Tracey and Peter have been together for 6 years after meeting online. Tracey is the organiser in the relationship and Peter is the complete opposite to her. He is a scatterbrain and really laid back. Aside from Tracey and their 2 year old son the big love of his life is football. With some advice from a naked stranger, a dodgy wedding veil, a sports club reception, can this football crazy groom really make this brides dreams come true?

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Sports bar chain Walk-Ons founder, Brandon Landry, and co-owner, NFL quarterback Drew Brees, go undercover in their own company to find out what its like for their 4,000 staff.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a sinking 55-year-old family restaurant. The owner, John Esposito, left high school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents business, Sals Pizzeria, since.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon heads to Wilkinsburg, Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jeans Southern Cuisine, which was opened 12 years ago by retired special education teacher Ms Jean Gould. Her employees say shes like Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde and thats why the local community stay away. Ms Jean insists shes only mean because her employees are lazy, but the business is falling apart.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Busy parents Lazarus and Evonnas dream home turned into a nightmare when a foundation problem drained all their renovation money. Before they can relocate to a move-in ready property with plenty of room for their three growing kids, they must get their dated interiors in check in order to make a sale.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Another engine issue emerges, forcing Capt Glenn to modify the plan and keep the returning guests entertained. With all the uncertainty going on in the engine room, Capt Glenn takes control and points out the crews mistakes.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Two episodes remain in the series and with Greg Daviess shiny head trophy within touching distance, tensions are beginning to run high between the contestants.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock are joined by guests Kevin Bridges and Joe Lycett. Rachel Riley is back on numbers-and-letters duty and Susie Dent is in Dictionary Corner.

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Dad is very excited, having just bought a new fax machine. Jonny, whos an estate agent, has been given a company car - the uncoolest car possible.

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Jonny is in a real pickle: he wants to split up with his 43-year-old girlfriend and boss, Liz, but is too scared to do so. Adam, meanwhile, is happy to keep teasing him about her age. Grandma offers Jonny some advice before showing him how to dance in the kitchen. While they dance to the music on the radio, it transpires that its just the music for the news headlines.

programme.title: Green Wing
programme.desc: Dr Statham enters politics, meaning the manifesto will at least be grammatically correct. Meanwhile, Caroline thinks her choice of lodger might have been a mistake - but finds she has to live with it. Elsewhere, Macs past catches up with him, and Martin inadvertently becomes a part-time pimp.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock are joined by guests Kevin Bridges and Joe Lycett. Rachel Riley is back on numbers-and-letters duty and Susie Dent is in Dictionary Corner.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: An extended version of the fifth show in the fifth series with guests Jedward, Lorraine Kelly, Micky Flanagan and Charlie Brooker.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Two episodes remain in the series and with Greg Daviess shiny head trophy within touching distance, tensions are beginning to run high between the contestants.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carl and Brianha bring the glamour of the French Riviera to Bognor Regis - with lasers and an asthma-friendly smoke machine. Will guests Mark and Lisa, and Justin and Karen, be impressed?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In West Yorkshire, there are terrible jokes, comedy teeth, plate-licking and a conga, as three couples compete to host the best dinner party.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: The One with Two Left Shoes
programme.desc: Stuart and Vicki are madly in love and desperate to get hitched, but cant find the funds. They are given £12,000 towards their big day, but the catch is that Stuart must organise the wedding alone. They will have no contact and Vicki wont know a single thing about her wedding until the big day three weeks later. Will music lover Stuart remember it is a wedding he is planning, not a concert?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: The One with the Pool Party
programme.desc: Emma and Patrick are childhood sweethearts, but lack of funds means that Emma has been waiting nearly 10 years to get Patrick up the aisle. So, they are given £12,000 pounds towards their big day and a chance for Patrick to prove himself to the woman he loves. However, theres a catch - they have both agreed in the presence of a lawyer that Patrick must organise the wedding alone.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: James and Hollie are desperate to get hitched, but dont have the cash. They are given £12,000 and the chance for James to prove himself to the woman he loves by making every decision about the wedding alone. He and Hollie have agreed in the presence of a lawyer that she will know nothing until the big day. Will James find the perfect venue and get the dress right?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: The One with the Drunk Bride
programme.desc: Nick and Laila are madly in love and have been engaged for two years. It would have taken them years to save up for Lailas dream wedding day, instead they will receive £12,000 towards their big day and a chance for Nick to prove himself to the woman he loves. They have agreed that Nick will organise the wedding alone and the bride wont know a single thing about it until the big day.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Tony and Pippa are desperate to get hitched, but dont have the cash. They are given £12,000 and the chance for Tony to prove himself to the woman he loves by making every decision about the wedding. He and Pippa have agreed in the presence of a lawyer that she will know absolutely nothing until the big day. Three weeks apart will push their relationship to the limit. Will his best men give him the best advice?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon heads to Wilkinsburg, Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jeans Southern Cuisine, which was opened 12 years ago by retired special education teacher Ms Jean Gould. Her employees say shes like Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde and thats why the local community stay away. Ms Jean insists shes only mean because her employees are lazy, but the business is falling apart.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across the United States in a bid to save failing restaurants from disaster. This week, Gordon visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bobs in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. The duo opened the grill in the summer of 2004 to a busy seafront crowd, but every year the bottom line collapses through the bleak winter months.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits Cafe Hon in Hampden, Maryland, Chiarellas in Philadelphia, and Leones in Montclair, New Jersey, to see whether the restaurant owners have taken his advice on board.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon head to the historic Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets an owner so stubborn and set in his ways that he doesnt realise hes the reason his restaurant is losing money. Owner Tom bought the business for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he is still refusing to let her run it. Gordon must fight a controlling boss who doesnt react well to his criticism.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he finds a brother-and-sister team who are unable to work together in a positive manner at an Italian restaurant called Levantis. Their relationship is so fractured that they are failing to save their fathers business from being overwhelmed by competition from other local eateries. The situation has become desperate and dad Tony is now in danger of losing his life savings.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts a the hit comedy show, packed with silly games and surprises. Team captains Sean Lock and Katherine Ryan take on Jon Richardson and David Mitchell. Nick Helm is in Dictionary corner with Susie Dent, while Rachel Riley is back on numbers-and-letters duty.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Sean Lock and Henning Wehn go up against Jon Richardson and Victoria Coren Mitchell. Tom Allen joins Countdowns resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: An extended edition of the sixth show where Jimmy Carr, Sean Lock and Jon Richardson are joined by Jack Dee, Kelly Osborne, Micky Flanagan and Jamelia to debate the hot topics of the week.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: An extended edition of the seventh show in which Jimmy Carr, Sean Lock and Jon Richardson are joined by Tim Westwood, Lauren Laverne, David ODoherty and Matthew Crosby, to debate the hot topics of the week.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly worries that the familys holiday traditions have grown stale, so she launches a new celebration called `Super Hanukkah. Feeling ignored by his older brother, Adam goes to great lengths to make Barry spend more time with him.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Murray doesnt want to remodel the kitchen, Beverly tries to do it herself, but purposefully makes mistakes in hopes that Murray will fix them.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Fantasy fan Evan plans to wage war on his wedding, but his emotional bride-to-be Zoe wants a low-key affair. The question remains as to whether this noble groom will make his bride feel like a queen.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley cant seem to choose between her past and present relationships and is forced to make a decision.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Its another epic Halloween full of costumes, tricks and treats for the Dunphy-Pritchett-Tucker clan as they deal with huge, unexpected news.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: A short clip from Rude Tubes naughty little sister Rude-ish Tube, featuring food and animals.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Easton, Pennsylvania, to visit struggling Italian restaurant Bella Luna. Rosaria bought the establishment to realise her son Gianfrancos ambition to become a chef.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Ramsay revisits Bostons La Galleria, the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Mass., and the Prohibition Gastropub in Everett, Wash.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam offers to make Murray a commercial starring Marvin, but Marvins actions mess up the plan.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Uncle Marvin reveals he has become a stockbroker and convinces Barry to invest his money with him.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The family gets together for the annual Fourth of July parade where Jay acts as the grand marshal. Haleys farewell to Arvin doesnt go as well as expected, and she is distracted by the return of an old flame.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley needs a little help deciding whether or not to tell Arvin about her kiss with Dylan and goes to Mitch and Cam for their advice.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon helps Peters Italian Restaurant in Babylon, New York where the peace of Long Island shore is regularly shattered by the antics of the volatile Pellegrino family, who run the restaurant.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The Mixing Bowl, a bijou diner in Bellmore, New York, is run by talented chef Billy with his wife Lisa and their manager Mike. Despite Billys flair in the kitchen, the business is haemorrhaging money via Mikes out-of-control marketing plans.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: On his birthday, Jake plans to introduce Amy to his mother, but he is surprised by the appearance of his father. Meanwhile, a new mandate involving body cams causes problems for Charles and Rose during a stakeout with Terry.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when the nine-nine is forced to share their station with the nine-eight precinct while their station is unavailable. Meanwhile, Boyle becomes jealous of Jakes old partner, who is an officer in the precinct.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Itchy and Scratchy and Poochie Show
programme.desc: Homer gets a job on `The Itchy and Scratchy Show, providing the voice of wisecracking hip-hop surfer dog Poochie, a new character brought in by the network to shore up falling viewing figures.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart befriends a gay antiques dealer, homophobic Homer decides to bring out his sons masculine side by taking him hunting, but all does not go to plan.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly nurses Coach Mellor back to health when he falls off the rope climbing equipment. Erica and her roommate get on each others nerves.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry enlists his friends help to break up Beverlys social group to get more of her attention. Adam attempts to trick Murray into loving the theatre.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire meet Dylans hippy mum, who turns out to have a very interesting past. Then, Cam and Mitch make a discovery in Lilys room.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria plays a trick that gets Phil and Joe in the malls new ad campaign. Elsewhere, technology gets the better of Jay, and Cam faces up to a school bully.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Holt adjust to their new lives in the Witness Protection Program, while Jimmy `The Butcher Figgis is still at large. Jake and Holts anonymity is at risk when a video of them goes viral.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jimmy `The Butcher Figgis sees the viral video, prompting Jake and Holt to begin plotting their attack. Back at the precinct, a new captain takes over.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Troy McClure hosts three spin-off stories from `The Simpsons television show. Featuring the voice of the late Phil Hartman.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Secret War of Lisa Simpson
programme.desc: Lisa enrols in an all-male military school and is subjected to challenges and silent treatment by the cadets.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer reinvigorates a celebrity chefs lost passion for food -- with some help from the mob.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer buys a new brand of milk, which has major effects on Bart and Lisa. Plus, Bart attempts to woo his new teacher.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off: Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Four more celebrities battle it out in the famous tent. James Acaster, Russell Tovey, Rylan Clark-Neal and Michelle Keegan tackle flapjacks and meringues in aid of Stand Up To Cancer.

programme.title: The Kings Man
programme.desc: One man must race against time to stop historys worst tyrants and criminal masterminds as they get together to plot a war that could wipe out millions of people and destroy humanity.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Nameya is after both beauty and brains, will she find her perfect package in a sexy guy or her first ever girlfriend? Dan loves a fairy-tale, but shes yet to find her leading man.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Oliver, who has Tourettes syndrome, hopes to bag his first ever girlfriend. Claire, whos usually surrounded by builders, wants to lay the foundations to find her dream partner.

programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: The Comancheros
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger is in pursuit of a gang of vicious outlaws who are running guns and whiskey to the Comanches. programme.title: Sea Wife
programme.desc: During the evacuation of Singapore, refugees are loaded onto a ship that is later torpedoed by the Japanese. Four survivors, three males and one female, find themselves stuck together in a lifeboat. Back in Britain, one of the males searches for the whereabouts of the female survivor.

programme.title: Drums Along the Mohawk
programme.desc: John Fords classic account of a Revolutionary War-era farmers attempts to build a life in the Mohawk valley.

programme.title: The Mark of Zorro
programme.desc: Californian aristocrat Don Diego Vega returns from Spain to find his homeland terrorised by a tyrannical governor. Casting aside his noble birth, he dons a mask to fight for justice and the people.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: The Men in Black have expanded to cover the globe, but so have the villains of the universe. When aliens that can take the form of any human arrive on Earth, H and M embark on a globe-trotting adventure to save the agency -- and ultimately the world.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: A sheriff must take matters into his own hands when a notorious drug lord escapes from FBI custody and comes speeding toward a showdown in the lawmans quiet border town.

programme.title: Warlock
programme.desc: A 17th-century Satanist and the witch hunter who snared him are propelled 300 years into the future.

programme.title: Happy Death Day 2U
programme.desc: College student Tree Gelbman becomes the target of a masked killer when she wakes up in an alternate reality. When the psychopath starts to go after her inner circle, Tree soon realizes that she must die over and over again to save her friends.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: On the next leg of his UK tour, James is joined in glorious Devon by his friend and Michelin-starred chef Simon Hulstone. James visits an extraordinary mushroom farm situated in a bungalow, and makes a tasty steak and mushroom dish. Simon samples some award-winning cheese, which inspires James to make a cheese platter fit for a king. The day ends with a trip to the Art Deco splendour of Burgh Island.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers: Route 66
programme.desc: The bikers cross the state of Arizona in search of the Wild West. They start by making a small detour from route 66, starting in Monument Valley to learn more about this striking place and discover the Navajo Nation. First, they enlist some locals to visit the most iconic landscape in the US which is also a very sacred land for the Navajo.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is serving up brunch ideas that are perfect for the holidays; build-your-own Leftover Frittata Sandwich board to a Crispy A.M. Wrap; Toast Trio with no cooking involved and a fabulous all-in-one Fruity Morning Galette.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.sub-title: Home Sweet Home: A Little Healthier
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shakes up some well-loved recipes and makes them a little healthier; she puts a spin on the familys takeout favourite, General Tsos chicken, and skips the crust for her classic apple pie.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: On the menu this time is squid and prawns spicy vegetable noodle broth, plus veggie chilli, crunchy tortilla and avocado salad.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: Asian Fish and Ultimate Pork Tacos
programme.desc: Asian fish, miso noodles and crunchy veg, and ultimate pork tacos, spicy black beans and avocado garden salad.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Ina makes Jeffrey a fantastic nostalgic birthday dinner that can all be made in advance. Plus shes answering everyones birthday dilemmas in Ask Ina.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Tickling your taste buds today will be tasty recipes for tequila lime chicken with guacamole and corn pudding. If you can fit it in after all that grub theres also a look at how to make key lime pie.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Bake Off is back. The tent awaits 12 of the nations best amateur bakers whore out to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, joined by Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its week two and our remaining 11 bakers face Cake Week, kicking off with a crowd-pleasing signature challenge.

programme.title: James Martin Delicious
programme.desc: James Martin prepares red onion and creme fraiche pizza, watercress and scallop salad and watercress and Stilton soup. The country around Winchester is famous for watercress, and James visits a grower and learns that the secret is in the water.

programme.title: James Martin Delicious
programme.desc: James prepares brill with boudin and black-eyed beans, halibut parcels with capers and beans and cod with shrimp butter. He also visits Mudderford Quay - famous for its beach huts and the best fish stall in the country.

programme.title: James Martin Delicious
programme.desc: Cef James Martin produces a dazzling array of recipes using staples such as marinated vegetables, cold meats, cheeses and fresh pasta. Here, James cooks rhubarb and ginger crumble, basil and soft fruit terrine and plum chutney. He also visits a local grower of organic rhubarb.

programme.title: James Martin Delicious
programme.desc: Its a mozzarella mouthful as James prepares aubergine and mozzarella stacks, marinated mozzarella, and tomato and mozzarella tart, and visits a farm on the Hampshire Downs that has a herd of buffalo, would you believe?

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy that it goes by the name of Demons Delight.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Grand Rapids, Michigan, where he takes on a five-pound tray loaded with chili dogs, French fries, beer-battered onion rings and a 20-ounce soda.

programme.title: Chef Grudge Match
programme.desc: Laila Ali hosts as two sous chefs settle grudges with their bosses. First, Brian Goodman is laying claim to Jonathan Sawyers James Beard Award. Then, DeUnaka Haley is out to prove that Niema DiGrazia needs to modernize or lose her customers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri digs into all kinds of killer grub. In Lansing, an out-of-this-world pizza joint, where the pie comes with a surprise, and in Wilmington, standout sandwiches bring a taste of Philly to the South.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri grabs some off-the-hook seafood and savoury sensations. In Lansing, a food truck dishes out shrimp burgers and a unique potato popper. In Tucson, a Bosnian restaurant fires up legit Eastern European specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into joints where you can literally grab all kinds of grub, starting with a Chicago-style spot in Tucson firing up deep-dish pie and twisted-up breadsticks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri grabs some barbecue and Southern comfort. In Seattle, a funky joint smokes up ribs and dishes out brisket chilli. In Wilmington, a breakfast-brunch spot gets dirty with their biscuits and their meatloaf.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richmans search for Americas best grub takes him to Tucson, Arizona. The belt busting challenges include an enormous combo platter called `The Presidents Plate.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richmans search for Americas best grub here takes him to New Brunswick, New Jersey. The eating challenges include a 12-inch triple-decker sandwich.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: The boys go golfing to get inspiration for a golf tournament cake and feel `lost in space while creating a cake for a local planetarium.

programme.desc: The bakery heavyweights are challenged to an eating contest and one of Frankies biggest fears is exposed while he is making a complicated cake.

programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieris hitting the road and grabbing grub straight out of Mums kitchen. In Boulder, a mother-son team servin up Chinese specialties like dan dan noodles and steamed buns.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is diggin into dishes featuring some dynamite dough. In Mesa, a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialties, including a meaty bun, and in Tucson, a place cookin up a big-time saucy sandwich.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Scrumptious cooking series with Ina Garten. Ina cooks with a classic ingredient, chicken. Her chicken salad and rotisserie chicken satay are real corkers.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: The delightful Ina Garten reveals her cooking tips. Ina cooks farm fresh food including scalloped tomatoes and crisp salad, and she hosts her very own question and answer session.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: The delightful Ina Garten reveals her cooking tips. Ina prepares a delicious grilled feast of Indonesian swordfish and later, a chef Joe Realmuto concocts a punchy BBQ sauce.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Scrumptious cooking series with Ina Garten. Baker Kathleen King shows Ina how to make mouthwatering double chocolate almond cookies, and her Irish soda bread is easy to prepare.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: The delightful Ina Garten reveals her cooking tips. Featuring recipes for a delicious rum and raisin tiramisu, and a gorgeous no cook Italian anti pasti platter.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: The delightful Ina Garten reveals her cooking tips. Ina makes lasagne with a Greek twist, and an arugula and watermelon feta salad.

programme.title: Nadiyas Fast Flavours
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain conjures up stress-free recipes that are ideal to chill out with on a lazy day at home. She begins with banana bread, the recipe that became a lockdown cliche.

programme.title: Nadiyas Fast Flavours
programme.desc: Nadiya turns her attention to one of her favourite things, special occasions. She starts with her lemon drizzle swirls. A twist on the cinnamon bun, these fluffy lemon- and cardamom-scented creations are topped with a pillowy citrus frosting.

programme.title: Nadiyas Time to Eat
programme.desc: Nadiya shares her favourite time-saving recipes to take the stress out of impressing guests. Recipes include raspberry cheesecake croissants, a satay chicken tray bake, and a cheats trifle with chia seeds, yoghurt, fresh fruit and sweet brioche.

programme.title: Nadiyas Time to Eat
programme.desc: Nadiya shares her favourite recipes for when she wants to whip up something sweet and delicious, but deceptively simple. Recipes include milkshake funnel cakes, a giant cookie, and a nutty baklava. On the road, Nadiya joins the team at Tate and Lyle on the River Thames.

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: Continuing his travels around France, James visits a region known for its traditional hearty cuisine, buried treasures and a love of all things duck - the Dordogne.

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: James Martins travels around France continue in the city of Lyon - known as the gastronomic capital of France - where he explores the two sides of the culinary scene.

programme.title: Mary Berrys Simple Comforts
programme.desc: Mary is off to explore how different families use food to create their own wonderful sense of home. Mary meets a father-and-daughter team who have taken their home cooking to the streets with their own food van.

programme.title: Mary Berrys Simple Comforts
programme.desc: Mary heads to the dramatic Yorkshire coastline to celebrate a unique bonfire party, explore the ancient seaport of Whitby and sample some classic, coastal comfort food, fish and chips and ice cream. Mary visits a small smokehouse that has been run by the same family for five generations, where she helps to smoke herring to make their world-renowned kippers.

programme.title: Mary Berrys Simple Comforts
programme.desc: Mary makes delicious food to warm her up after a day out in the cold, including a tempting sausage and pepper hotpot, some simple twice-baked souffles, a mushroom, lentil and double potato jumble and an onion and sage open puff pastry tart.

programme.title: Mary Berry Cook and Share
programme.desc: Mary is working behind the scenes at an Indian wedding, shell be helping the caterers pull off this huge event that feeds 400 people from morning to night while adding a recipe of her own to the menu.

programme.title: Mary Berry Cook and Share
programme.desc: Mary travels to the beautiful city of Bristol. Her connection to the city is extensive: it was here that she had her first job and where her son William studied at university, and its currently home to her granddaughter Grace.

programme.title: Mary Berry Cook and Share
programme.desc: Mary is off to Birmingham, home of the world-famous cricket ground at Edgbaston, where she immerses herself in the world of cricket.

programme.title: Mary Berry Cook and Share
programme.desc: Mary explores the historic Jurassic Coast, famous for fossils, beautiful coastal towns and delicious seafood. Mary cant wait to share the delights on offer and meet the people passionate about preserving and showcasing them.

programme.title: Secret Eats With Adam Richman
programme.desc: Adam seeks out Singapores secret eats, including chilli crab at a hard-to-find restaurant, chasiu at a speakeasy hidden beneath a ramen shop, and a gourmet hot dog with candied bacon at an eatery in a movie theatre parking garage.

programme.title: Secret Eats With Adam Richman
programme.desc: Adam eats like a local in Bangkok, where he finds hidden restaurants serving spicy curries, traditional boat noodles served in a locals-only floating market and an off-menu fusion Pad Thai at one of the best noodle shops.

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Italy
programme.desc: Foodie Adam Richman embarks on a delicious culinary adventure across Italy. He visits the places that are home to the most iconic Italian dishes.
